content: Octowiki already exists as a tool. The shoe-makers repo (../shoe-makers) has a working behaviour tree implementation that serves as the model for intentional's behaviour tree. The intentional inbox differs from shoe-makers: it captures conversations automatically (not human-written instruction files), triages signal to Octowiki (not acting on instructions), and maintains an immutable archive in done/ (not deleting after processing).

provenance.raw_agent: The behaviour tree is fully implemented — src/tree/default-tree.ts has [inbox messages?] → inbox already wired up. Key differences between shoe-makers' inbox and what intentional needs...
provenance.raw_user: we have octowiki and we have a model for behaviour tree in my repo ../shoemakers (maybe hyphenated)
